◎简　　介  

　　Ramsey Denison investigates a terrifying pattern of police corruption and discovers that behind the shimmering surface of Las Vegas lies a police department with individuals willing to go to any lengths to cover up crimes.一部讲述美国赌城治安管理部门幕后黑暗的故事。
